## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan follow-up strategies for closed-lost deals, organize Slack channels, and coordinate an upcoming dinner event.](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Create lists in CRM for follow-ups on closed-lost deals, focusing on quality leads and Bay Area contacts](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Organize a dinner event on the 25th with Tiago, Bridget, and Andy in SF; compile guest list of founders and growth/marketing leaders](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Restructure Slack channels into folders for better organization and accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Implement proactive outreach strategy for maintaining relationships with key contacts](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Topics

### CRM Follow-up Strategy

  - [Utilize 'closed-lost' deals for potential follow-ups (e.g., Coast, spinach.io, transmit security)](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Create Kanban-style lists (e.g., Backlog, Fathom) to organize and prioritize contacts](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Enrich contact information with updated details (current company, connections, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Use custom fields and views (table, Kanban) to manage and visualize contact data effectively](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Focus on creating lists for quality leads and Bay Area contacts for events and networking](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

### Dinner Event Planning (June 25th)

  - [Attendees: Tiago, Bridget, and Andy confirmed for SF](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Target guest list: Combination of founders and growth/marketing leaders, leaning towards marketing](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Action items:](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [Create a project in Slack for coordination](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [Compile list of potential invitees](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [Research venues (Marcel to find options)](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [Dignory to lead coordination efforts, with Marissa assisting after June 16th](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Slack Channel Organization

  - [Create folders to categorize channels (e.g., "internal clients")](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Move existing channels into appropriate folders](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Plan to archive inactive or unused channels in the future](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Outreach and Relationship Management

  - [Implement a proactive approach to follow-ups, prioritizing sooner rather than later](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Utilize Slack for direct communication with contacts who are platform members](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Strategy for outreach:](https://fathom.video/share/tabS9zkicCHs8J-P_oiJsELiQS28o_zy?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
    1.  Dignory to initiate contact, creating a thread with Marcel and the contact
    2.  Schedule catch-ups during days with multiple meetings for efficiency
    3.  Aim for a 6-week lead time on scheduling, allowing for flexibility

## Next Steps
